name: Pull Request
description: Standard pull request template
---

## Description

<!-- What does this PR do? Link to related issue(s). -->

Closes #

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Plugin (new or updated plugin)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / code cleanup
- [ ] Performance improvement

## Component(s) Affected

- [ ] Frontend
- [ ] Backend
- [ ] Engine (`@gitcity/engine`)
- [ ] SDK (`gitcity-sdk`)
- [ ] Plugins
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Scripts / DevOps

## Screenshots / Recordings

<!-- For visual changes, add before/after screenshots or a screen recording. -->

## Testing

<!-- How was this tested? -->

- [ ] Tested locally with `node scripts/dev.js`
- [ ] Verified in Chrome
- [ ] Verified in Firefox
- [ ] Backend API endpoints tested
- [ ] Plugin hooks tested

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the project style guidelines
- [ ] Self-reviewed the diff
- [ ] Added/updated documentation if needed
- [ ] No `console.log` or debug artifacts left
- [ ] Commit messages follow conventional commits
